prestazioni: Engine swap to Isuzu 6WG1-TC 10.5L turbocharged inline-6 diesel (stock in heavy-duty Forward models) with a BorgWarner EFR 9180 turbocharger, custom 2.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping, and a Paccar MX-13 fuel system upgrade for 500+ hp at 2,200 RPM with 1,800 Nm torque

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Isuzu OEM 16-speed ZF EcoLife automatic transmission with a South Bend Clutch dual-disc ceramic clutch kit, reinforced differential with a Torsen LSD, and custom 3.73:1 gearing for highway cruising

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B8 8112 remote-reservoir shocks, Eibach Pro-Truck springs (2-inch drop), and poly bushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity, paired with 22.5-inch steel wheels wrapped in Michelin X Multi Z 315/80R22.5 tires
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Isuzu Forward cab-over panels extended 4 inches per side with carbon fiber fender flares from Liberty Walk’s commercial vehicle division, retaining OEM Isuzu Forward badging

Full Rocket Bunny-inspired aero kit for medium-duty trucks, including a carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts with integrated LED light bars (Osram 24V 10,000-lumen units), and a rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust outlets (custom-fabricated by Fujitsubo)

Interior retrofit with Recaro Pole Position seats (modified for 24V Isuzu Forward harness), a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a custom gauge cluster featuring AEM X-Series wideband AFR and boost gauges in Isuzu OEM housings
